description: Panel Showcase — every supported panel type and dashboard feature in one dashboard. Deployed at /dashboards/panel-showcase.

graphs.title: SOC Overview
graphs.markdown: KPI counters, severity distribution, event volume trends, indicator density, detection funnel, and multi-source event explorer, sourced from live EDR, Identity, and alert data. Use the **Site** filter above to scope all panels to a specific site.

graphs.title: Total Alerts [number]
graphs.query:
dataSource.name='alert'
| group count=count()

graphs.title: Identity Logon Failures [number]
graphs.query: dataSource.name='Identity' unmapped.type='Logon Failure' | group count=count()

graphs.title: Active EDR Endpoints [number]
graphs.query: dataSource.name='SentinelOne' | group agents=estimate_distinct(endpoint.name)

graphs.title: Open Alert Queue [gauge]
graphs.query:
dataSource.name='alert'
| group value=count()

graphs.title: Alert Severity Distribution [donut]
graphs.query:
dataSource.name='alert' severity_id != null
| group count=count() by severity_id
| filter severity_id >= 1
| let label = severity_id == 5 ? 'Critical' : severity_id == 4 ? 'High' : severity_id == 3 ? 'Medium' : severity_id == 2 ? 'Low' : 'Info'
| group count=sum(count) by label
| filter label != null

graphs.title: Top Alert Titles [stacked bar]
graphs.query:
dataSource.name='alert' finding_info.title != null
| group count=count() by title=finding_info.title
| sort -count | limit 8
| columns title, count

graphs.title: EDR Event Categories Over Time [stacked bar]
graphs.query:
dataSource.name='SentinelOne'
| filter event.category in ('process', 'file', 'dns', 'ip', 'indicators', 'logins')
| group count=count() by category=event.category, timestamp=timebucket('1h')
| transpose category on timestamp

graphs.title: Indicator Category Density [honeycomb]
graphs.query:
dataSource.name='SentinelOne' event.category='indicators' indicator.category != null
| group value=count() by label=indicator.category
| sort -value | limit 15

graphs.title: Threat Detection Funnel [funnel]
graphs.query:
| union
(
  dataSource.name='SentinelOne' event.type=*
  | group Count=count() by Step='1 - Collected Events'
),
(
  dataSource.name='SentinelOne' src.process.storyline.id=*
  | group Count=estimate_distinct(src.process.storyline.id) by Step='2 - Storylines'
),
(
  dataSource.name='SentinelOne' event.category='indicators' indicator.name=*
  | group Count=estimate_distinct(indicator.name) by Step='3 - Indicators'
),
(
  dataSource.name='alert' finding_info.internal_uid=*
  | group Count=estimate_distinct(finding_info.internal_uid) by Step='4 - Alerts'
)
| columns Step, Count

graphs.title: Multi-Source Event Explorer [tabbed table]
graphs.query:
dataSource.name='alert' finding_info.title != null
| group count=count() by finding_info.title, metadata.product.name
| sort -count | limit 20

tabs.title: Top Alerts
tabs.query:
dataSource.name='alert' finding_info.title != null
| group count=count() by finding_info.title, metadata.product.name
| sort -count | limit 20

tabs.title: EDR Indicators
tabs.query:
dataSource.name='SentinelOne' event.category='indicators' indicator.category != null
| group count=count() by indicator.category, indicator.name
| sort -count | limit 20

tabs.title: Identity Failures
tabs.query:
dataSource.name='Identity' unmapped.type='Logon Failure'
| group count=count() by user.name, src_endpoint.ip
| sort -count | limit 20

tabs.title: FortiGate Top Actions
tabs.query:
dataSource.name='FortiGate' unmapped.action != null
| group count=count(), bytes_in=sum(number(traffic.bytes_in)), bytes_out=sum(number(traffic.bytes_out)) by src_endpoint.ip, dst_endpoint.ip, unmapped.action
| filter bytes_in > 0 OR bytes_out > 0
| sort -count | limit 20

graphs.title: Threat Hunting
graphs.markdown: Advanced panel types for analyst workflows: alert SLA tracking, login heatmaps, authentication flow analysis, process network outlier detection, traffic volume histogram, and EDR event volume trends.

graphs.title: Alert Volume vs SLA Threshold [bullet]
graphs.query:
dataSource.name='alert' severity_id != null
| group value=count() by severity_id
| filter severity_id >= 1
| filter severity_id <= 5
| let target = severity_id == 5 ? 50 : severity_id == 4 ? 100 : severity_id == 3 ? 300 : severity_id == 2 ? 1000 : 3000
| let label = severity_id == 5 ? 'Critical' : severity_id == 4 ? 'High' : severity_id == 3 ? 'Medium' : severity_id == 2 ? 'Low' : 'Info'
| sort -severity_id
| columns value, target, label

graphs.title: Identity Logon Activity by User [heatmap]
graphs.query:
dataSource.name='Identity' unmapped.type='Logon Success' user.name=* user.name != ''
| group EventCount=count() by user_name=user.name, timestamp=timebucket('1h')
| filter EventCount > 0
| filter user_name in ('OktaService', 'THEBORG-1AUE$', 'THEBORG-116O$', 'WIN-1LHT45GN058$', 'GREAT-HALLDC$', 'WAYNETOWER-PROX$', 'DC01$', 'DC$', 'SYSTEM', 'svc_adconnector', 'DC-WIN11-PROX$', 'jeanluc', 'DC-WIN11X1-PROX$', 'FILESERVER2019$', 'Robin')
| transpose user_name on timestamp

graphs.title: Login Flow: Source IP to User Domain [sankey]
graphs.query:
dataSource.name='Identity' unmapped.type='Logon Success' user.domain != null src_endpoint.ip != null
| group c=count() by source=src_endpoint.ip, target=user.domain
| filter source != '' AND target != ''
| sort -c | limit 25
| columns source, target, c

graphs.title: Process Network Outliers [scatter bubble]
graphs.description: Upper-right outliers = processes contacting many IPs across many ports. Bubble size = unique destination ports.
graphs.query:
dataSource.name='SentinelOne' event.category='ip' src.process.name != null
| group connections=count(), dests=estimate_distinct(dst.ip.address), ports=estimate_distinct(dst.port.number) by src.process.name
| filter connections > 5
| sort -connections | limit 30
| columns connections, dests, ports, label=src.process.name

graphs.title: FortiGate Inbound Traffic by Size [bar histogram]
graphs.query:
dataSource.name='FortiGate' traffic.bytes_in=*
| let bytes = number(traffic.bytes_in)
| filter bytes > 0
| let bucket = bytes < 1000 ? '1. <1 KB' : bytes < 10000 ? '2. 1-10 KB' : bytes < 100000 ? '3. 10-100 KB' : bytes < 1000000 ? '4. 100KB-1MB' : bytes < 10000000 ? '5. 1-10 MB' : '6. >10 MB'
| group count=count() by bucket
| sort bucket
| columns bucket, count

graphs.title: EDR Event Volume Over Time [stacked area]
graphs.query:
dataSource.name='SentinelOne'
| filter event.category in ('process', 'file', 'dns', 'ip', 'indicators', 'logins', 'registry')
| group count=count() by category=event.category, timestamp=timebucket('1h')
| transpose category on timestamp

graphs.title: Panel Features
graphs.markdown: Demonstrates remaining panel features: **distribution** histogram of network destination ports, **area chart** using plots array (not PowerQuery), **gauge with estimate_distinct**, **number panel with console drill-through link**, **pie chart**, and **`filters[]`**: the Alert Product dropdown above is a tab-level `filters[]` widget — selecting a product filters all panels on this tab in real time. This is the correct filtering mechanism for TABBED dashboards. Note: `#VarName#` query substitution only works in flat (non-TABBED) dashboards.

graphs.title: Critical & High Alerts [number + drillthrough]
graphs.query:
dataSource.name='alert' severity_id=*
| let sev = number(severity_id)
| filter sev >= 4
| group count=count()

graphs.title: Distinct Alert Types [gauge + estimate_distinct]
graphs.query:
dataSource.name='alert' finding_info.title=*
| group value=estimate_distinct(finding_info.title)

graphs.title: EDR Event Rate by Category [area - plots]
Alerts by Product [pie]
graphs.query:
dataSource.name='alert' metadata.product.name=*
| group count=count() by metadata.product.name
| sort -count

graphs.title: Alerts by Title [filters[] active above]
graphs.query:
dataSource.name='alert' finding_info.title=*
| group count=count() by finding_info.title, metadata.product.name
| sort -count | limit 20
